programme.title: E1 - Legacy
programme.desc: As President Hamelin takes part in the unveiling of a commemorative bust, he realises that he has still done nothing for Quebec that could be called ''great''. He tasks Karine and Councillor Arsenault with finding him a project that will go down in history.

programme.desc: Electricity outages are increasingly intense and increasingly frequent throughout Quebec. Harvey has no choice but to explain the reality of the situation to Hamelin. The terrorist threat still hangs over both the university and Gabrielle.

programme.title: E14 - Glenat, A Grenoble Story
programme.desc: In Grenoble, Loic Ballet meets the Glenat family, founders of the famous publishing house. This true literary institution is housed in the magnificent Sainte-Cecile convent, rich in history.

programme.title: E69 - T3, Provencale Architecture
programme.desc: Fashion, craftwork, design, beauty, cuisine, lifestyle... a round-up of the best moments from ''Tendance XXI''!

programme.title: E8 - Melanie's Challenges/The Keeper Of The Keys
programme.desc: In 2006, Melanie Brugger had a terrible riding accident. She suffered a head injury and was in a coma for 27 days. When she awoke, she decided to take up mountaineering. Vincent Hammel hails from Porrentruy and nurtures a passion for his city's history.

programme.title: E104
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E6 - Is Butchery A Disappearing Profession?
programme.desc: There is a shortage of new butchers. Nearly 10,000 butcher positions are unfilled across Canada. Why? Also covered: potassium, essential for health; food waste at festivals; rockfish (sebaste), now sold in stores.

programme.title: E17 - Renovated Apartment In Brussels
programme.desc: Cedric and Virginie visit an apartment in Brussels that has been completely renovated by a young couple of architects. Also featured: Chateau de la Louveterie in the heart of the Ardennes; IKOAB, a new form of co-living for people over 45; making a table extension.

programme.desc: Fashion, craftwork, design, beauty, cuisine, lifestyle... a round-up of the best moments from ''Tendance XXI''!

programme.title: E16 - Finding Your Way In Dog Food
programme.desc: Raw, frozen, grain-free, freeze-dried, vegetarian, carnivorous or even insect-based... canine food is evolving, far from traditional kibble. Also featured: a taste test of cream cheeses; delicious monastic confectionery from Portugal.

programme.title: E55 - Aix-Les-Bains (Best-Of)
programme.desc: The best moments of the show in Aix-les-Bains.

programme.title: E17 - Renovated Apartment In Brussels
programme.desc: Cedric and Virginie visit an apartment in Brussels that has been completely renovated by a young couple of architects. Also featured: Chateau de la Louveterie in the heart of the Ardennes; IKOAB, a new form of co-living for people over 45; making a table extension.

programme.title: E5 - Effects Of Climate Change On Indigenous Peoples
programme.desc: In Old Crow, how are Chief Dana Tizya-Tramm and his Gwich'in community facing climate warming and what can the rest of the world learn from their initiatives?

programme.desc: Jagaddhatri, a secret crime officer, and orphan Swayambhu partner to fight crime. Only a few friends know her real identity; later, they marry happily.

programme.title: E109 - Let Justice Be Done / The Great Spring Clean
programme.desc: Barbabeau forgot to return his book to the library. As Mr Strict the librarian is visiting Barbapapa today, Barbabeau decides to run away. // Barbamama wants the barbababies to tidy their bedrooms. They're hiding to escape the drudgery.

programme.title: E102 - Present
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma.

programme.title: E223 - Buttercup / We Need To Save The Corals
programme.desc: Barbidou's beautiful roses mysteriously disappeared during the night. // Barbapapa decides to tell the barbababies about the time he went to explore the Arctic and the seabed.

programme.title: E904 - The Rocketship Ride
programme.desc: Darington can't wait to ride the Great Rocketship Ride, the tallest, fastest carnival ride in all of Axle City! But when Darington's tickets blow away, he and Blaze must go on an epic adventure to retrieve them!

programme.title: E212 - The Crew Builds A Ballpark / The Crew Builds A Surf Bridge
programme.desc: When Rubble's favorite baseball star Aaron Judge can't get out of town to the home run derby, Rubble & Crew build a stadium to hold the derby right in Builder Cove! // Surf's up for Rubble & Crew! Well, if they can get over the super hot sand, it is.

programme.title: E102 - Present
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma.

programme.title: E509 - The Great Space Race
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ take off into space for a race that's out of this world! Along the way to Planet Victory, they meet friendly aliens, dodge asteroids, and face off against Crusher's space ship!

programme.title: E510 - Deep Sea Grand Prix
programme.desc: For the first time ever, Blaze and AJ are racing under the ocean! Blaze transforms into a submarine and speeds through sunken ships and coral reefs to reach the giant sand castle at the finish line!

programme.title: E112 - A Guayabera For Tico / Falling Estrella's
programme.desc: Boots gets a Guayabera shirt as a gift for Tico, but becomes attached to it on the way to Tico's house. // Dora, Boots, and Papi want to see the Quetzal constellation dance across the sky, but it loses three stars! Dora has to get them back in time.

programme.title: E406 - The Crew Fixes The Observatory / The Crew Builds A Meow Yard
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are ready to replace the broken telescope lens at the Observatory. Until it starts a fiery fiasco during delivery! / Cafe Carl's kittens cause construction chaos in the Bark Yard! Can the crew create a conclusion to the cat catastrophe?

programme.title: E217 - Paper Landscapes / Cowgirl
programme.desc: Barbamama and Barbapapa are surprised to see more and more billboards on the road. // Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

programme.desc: Tommy is in a Rocket Race, Tim supports his brother.

programme.title: E103 - Parents

programme.title: E103 - Rocket Race

programme.title: E6 - Changing Tides
programme.desc: Bundle up as Lizzie heads north to tag sharks and witness first-hand the slow, sobering disappearance of sea ice. Do time in bear jail with polar bears who are caught raiding a town for food after their icy hunting grounds diminish.

programme.title: E6 - Changing Tides
programme.desc: Bundle up as Lizzie heads north to tag sharks and witness first-hand the slow, sobering disappearance of sea ice. Do time in bear jail with polar bears who are caught raiding a town for food after their icy hunting grounds diminish.

programme.title: E5 - The Scent Detectives
programme.desc: A Labrador cross and its partner help prevent ecological disaster in Canada, a Lagotto Romagnolo unearths a rare delicacy in Washington forests, and a Belgian malinois team tracks down the critically endangered geometric tortoise to save the species.

programme.title: E1 - Baby Sea Otter Finds a Family
programme.desc: Join the vet and his team in saving a massive sea lion caught in a plastic noose, and then visit the Rescue Center, where a harbor seal pup may lose its eyesight and a baby sea otter needs a risky but life-saving surgery.

programme.title: E3 - Waiting for Winter
programme.desc: It’s November at Cape Tatnam. Winter is coming to the lower Western shore of Hudson Bay. But the ice - which should be forming on Hudson Bay by now - is nowhere to be seen. 2016 has been the warmest year on record. In late November, the temperature is 10 degrees warmer than its average. Climate change is wreaking havoc across the North. At just below zero degrees Celsius, the sea cannot freeze.

programme.title: E3 - Thailand: Coming of Age
programme.desc: The temperate north meets the tropical south along the Mekong’s banks in Thailand. Follow the river through the Golden Triangle and see the courtship dances of the region’s abundant bird species. Then take in a festival honouring water spirits.

programme.title: E9 - Dilla and Delilah
programme.desc: The fate of several graduates awaits the next round of wild releases. Meanwhile, runaway Zalipa is found, but her partner in crime, Tulia, is still missing. And Baby Clarita has a complete meltdown as the vets perform surgery on her mother.

programme.title: E1 - The Clean Up Crew
programme.desc: Winter in Marakele National Park is one of the scarcest, but also most plentiful, times of the year. See how a giraffe’s demise becomes a source of life for the region’s vultures, whose survival depends on the decaying flesh of animals like these.

programme.title: E3 - Rivers

Climate change is wreaking havoc across the North. At just below zero degrees Celsius, the sea cannot freeze.

programme.title: E6 - Changing Tides
programme.desc: Bundle up as Lizzie heads north to tag sharks and witness first-hand the slow, sobering disappearance of sea ice. Do time in bear jail with polar bears who are caught raiding a town for food after their icy hunting grounds diminish.

programme.title: E5 - The Scent Detectives
programme.desc: A Labrador cross and its partner help prevent ecological disaster in Canada, a Lagotto Romagnolo unearths a rare delicacy in Washington forests, and a Belgian malinois team tracks down the critically endangered geometric tortoise to save the species.

programme.title: E1 - Baby Sea Otter Finds a Family
programme.desc: Join the vet and his team in saving a massive sea lion caught in a plastic noose, and then visit the Rescue Center, where a harbor seal pup may lose its eyesight and a baby sea otter needs a risky but life-saving surgery.

programme.title: E3 - Waiting for Winter
programme.desc: It’s November at Cape Tatnam. Winter is coming to the lower Western shore of Hudson Bay. But the ice - which should be forming on Hudson Bay by now - is nowhere to be seen. 2016 has been the warmest year on record. In late November, the temperature is 10 degrees warmer than its average. Climate change is wreaking havoc across the North. At just below zero degrees Celsius, the sea cannot freeze.

programme.title: E1 - Baby Sea Otter Finds a Family
programme.desc: Join the vet and his team in saving a massive sea lion caught in a plastic noose, and then visit the Rescue Center, where a harbor seal pup may lose its eyesight and a baby sea otter needs a risky but life-saving surgery.

programme.title: E3 - Thailand: Coming of Age
programme.desc: The temperate north meets the tropical south along the Mekong’s banks in Thailand. Follow the river through the Golden Triangle and see the courtship dances of the region’s abundant bird species. Then take in a festival honouring water spirits.

programme.title: E9 - Dilla and Delilah
programme.desc: The fate of several graduates awaits the next round of wild releases. Meanwhile, runaway Zalipa is found, but her partner in crime, Tulia, is still missing. And Baby Clarita has a complete meltdown as the vets perform surgery on her mother.

programme.title: E1 - The Clean Up Crew
programme.desc: Winter in Marakele National Park is one of the scarcest, but also most plentiful, times of the year. See how a giraffe’s demise becomes a source of life for the region’s vultures, whose survival depends on the decaying flesh of animals like these.

programme.title: E3 - Rivers
programme.desc: Trace dazzling waterways all over the world, from volcanic rivers in Russia’s far east to geothermal streams in Florida. Watch as beavers transform entire landscapes with their well-engineered dams, then enjoy a winter spa day with manatees.

programme.title: E525 - Tangled Web
programme.desc: A Mobile homeowner reports a theft of $9,000 to the police, and just thirty minutes later, a local father of three is mysteriously killed on their front porch.

programme.title: E106 - Vengeance
programme.desc: A man shoots four people in broad daylight, leaving Tulsa detectives, attorneys, and everyone impacted struggling to explain his mental state.

programme.title: E527 - Death At The Door
programme.desc: After an argument in his home, a man answers a knock at his front door and is suddenly shot and killed.

programme.title: E9 - Vanished
programme.desc: When a Georgia college student disappears, police open an investigation into a possible hate crime and abduction. However, Dr. Jamie Downs uncovers evidence that spins the case in a new direction.

programme.title: E9 - Sheila LaBarre: Sheila The Peeler
programme.desc: In Epping, New Hampshire, Sheila LaBarre was known as an eccentric widow who loved her rabbits. But her turbulent childhood, a coma-induced vision, and her husband's death sent Sheila on a mission to kill.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Master Cutter
programme.desc: Follows a former scout ranger-turned-tailor who discovers his biological daughter is tied to a criminal syndicate.

programme.title: Master Cutter
programme.desc: Follows a former scout ranger-turned-tailor who discovers his biological daughter is tied to a criminal syndicate.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area
programme.desc: “Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area” is a bilingual interview program on Shenzhen TV that focuses on in-depth exploration and research. With a global perspective on the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, it captures cutting-edge trends in economic and trade exchanges, technological innovation, cultural trends, and more between China and the world. Through on-site research and interviews, the program engages in conversations with leaders from government, business, technology, and cultural sectors. It showcases technological achievements, trends in economic and trade exchanges, and mutual learning in civilization exchanges. Since its inception over two years ago, “Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area” has aired more than a hundred episodes of specialized interviews. The program integrates prominent international figures into the Greater Bay Area, where guests draw from their personal experiences living and working in the area or provide professional perspectives o

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.desc: Ilumgand transforms into a monster due to demon schemes. Jin and Abelia launch an attack to stop him. However, their attacks have no effect.

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there's no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there's no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.title: Phoenix Panorama
programme.desc: PHOENIX PANORAMA : To entertain, educate and inform audiences, Panoramic Eyeshot of Phoenix, a series of captivating and controversial documentaries, includes segments on current affairs, historical anniversaries and exclusive insider views on present developments.

programme.title: E425
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.

programme.title: E1008 - My Phony Valentine / Man Of My Schemes
programme.desc: On Valentines Day, Rusty and his girlfriend, Amber, must hide their love when they realize their parents are business rivals. // When Lori sees a photo of Bobby with another woman on social media, she decides it's time to start dating again.

programme.title: E329 - Pardon My Wand / Stupor-stition
programme.desc: SpongeBob obtains a magician's wand and accidentally causes magical mayhem wherever he goes. // On Friday the 13th, Mr. Krabs' extreme superstitions become a disruption for everyone around him.

programme.title: E1008 - My Phony Valentine
programme.desc: On Valentines Day, Rusty and his girlfriend, Amber, must hide their love when they realize their parents are business rivals.

programme.title: E414 - Good Sports / Geri-antics
programme.desc: Lynn finds an unexpected TV sports watching buddy in the family's next-door neighbor, Mr. Grouse. // When Lisa realizes that Pop Pop won't be around forever, she turns to science to ensure his longevity.

programme.title: E108 - LAD / Before 10AM
programme.desc: Determined to learn the truth about Jack's secret morning life, Lily does the unthinkable and wakes up early. But her sleuthing gets them both in big trouble. // Lil and her BFFs Anusha & Debs fight to win the coveted trophy at Hank N Beans arcade.

programme.title: E106 - The Three Ravens / Left Holding the Bag
programme.desc: Ellie & the kids investigate cryptic Mrs. Withers. When Jack goes missing in her creepy home, Ellie and Lil must save him! // Eager to become Master Criminals, Lil & Jack help Chuck with his 'dirty laundry'. But are they ready for a life of crime?

programme.title: E329 - Pardon My Wand / Stupor-stition
programme.desc: SpongeBob obtains a magician's wand and accidentally causes magical mayhem wherever he goes. // On Friday the 13th, Mr. Krabs' extreme superstitions become a disruption for everyone around him.

programme.title: E406 - Sea Haw / Li'l Past-cals
programme.desc: Patrick hosts a countrified variety show. // The Kelpbed Kids travel to the future to get their kicking can back.

programme.title: E1008 - My Phony Valentine
programme.desc: On Valentines Day, Rusty and his girlfriend, Amber, must hide their love when they realize their parents are business rivals.

programme.title: E271 - Something Narwhal This Way Comes / C.H.U.M.S.
programme.desc: Two familiar faces from SpongeBob's past visit Bikini Bottom, but they bring a big problem along with them. // After falling down the drain, Plankton finds an unlikely ally in the sewers.

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: It's Showtime Live[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E9 - JJ's Favorite Songs & Stories!
programme.desc: It's story time with JJ's favorite songs & stories! First, sing along to 'Wheels on the Bus' as JJ & his friends put on an interactive show. Then, settle in for some classic tales. Watch as the three little pigs try to build houses strong enough to keep the Big Bad Wolf away. Then, find out who wins a big race: the speedy hare or the slow & steady tortoise! Finally, learn a lesson about working hard with the story of the Grasshopper & the Ants.

programme.title: E2 - Baby John's Ultimate Playdate Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for some ultimate playdate fun with Baby John! First, he & his family love to play hide & seek, but where is everyone hiding? Then, Miss Hannah teaches all the kids at school a funny face game where they take turns making silly faces! The fun continues as building a treehouse takes a lot of work, but Baby John & his family learn how to work as a team to build a super cool new one!

programme.title: E9 - JJ's Favorite Songs & Stories!
programme.desc: It's story time with JJ's favorite songs & stories! First, sing along to 'Wheels on the Bus' as JJ & his friends put on an interactive show. Then, settle in for some classic tales. Watch as the three little pigs try to build houses strong enough to keep the Big Bad Wolf away. Then, find out who wins a big race: the speedy hare or the slow & steady tortoise! Finally, learn a lesson about working hard with the story of the Grasshopper & the Ants.

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E4 - Sun, Moon, Stars
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E18 - JJ's Animal Friends & Counting!
programme.desc: Join JJ for fun with animal friends & counting! JJ has to find five little ducks that ran away from their bath! Then, Bear helps JJ search nature to find his missing teddy bear. The animal fun continues as JJ plays hide-and-seek with shark toys, counts baby ducklings at the park & watches ten little dinosaur eggs hatch! Plus, act out the story of the 'Three Little Pigs' & sing along to 'Little Miss Muffet'!

programme.title: E9 - JJ's Favorite Songs & Stories!
programme.desc: It's story time with JJ's favorite songs & stories! First, sing along to 'Wheels on the Bus' as JJ & his friends put on an interactive show. Then, settle in for some classic tales. Watch as the three little pigs try to build houses strong enough to keep the Big Bad Wolf away. Then, find out who wins a big race: the speedy hare or the slow & steady tortoise! Finally, learn a lesson about working hard with the story of the Grasshopper & the Ants.

programme.title: E1 - The Wacky World of Winston & Orphle!
programme.desc: Welcome to the wacky world of Winston & Orphle! First, Winston tricks a Magic Pet into growing his robots of Mila & Morphle big enough to steal the entire Magic Pet Center! Then, Orphle causes trouble on his own when he runs away with the cake Mila made for her & Morphle's Matchiversary. The two troublemakers team up to try & get their hands on a special surprise gift, but it's up to Mila & Morphle to stop them!

programme.title: E2 - Gecko vs Weasel: Ultimate Rivalry
programme.desc: The ultimate rivalry between Gecko & Mr. Weasel heats up! After a big rainstorm, Weasel challenges Gecko to a head-to-head car wash competition. Then, Weasel decides he wants a Mechanical of his own, so he hatches a scheme to try & steal Gecko's secret plans! The rivalry continues as Weasel tries to show off his new sports car but gets stuck, & his automated car wash mistakes Weasel for his car!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & bedtime songs! Mummy helps Mia begin her nighttime routine by tucking her toys into cozy spaces. Then, they try out some super simple & calming animal-related yoga poses to help Mia have a restful sleep. Daddy also shows Mia that routines can be fun with his 'brush your teeth dance'! Finally, Mummy & Daddy play a beautiful lullaby on their guitars to help soothe the kids to sleep under the twinkling stars.

programme.title: The Hockey Mom's Revenge
programme.desc: Former Olympic-hopeful hockey player Diane becomes obsessed with her son Alex's success. Fuelled by jealousy toward Rachel and her star son Ethan, she sabotages others to ensure Alex comes out on top.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It: Murder 101
programme.desc: Gabbi's luck hits a snag after reuniting with Charles David, Dean of Criminology at Williams College. She's there as a guest lecturer, but when Charles is found dead next morning an investigation begins.

programme.title: E10 - Grilled Cheese & Tomato Soup Featuring Anna Gass
programme.desc: Racheal teams up with her friend, chef and author, Anna Gass, to make an Italian version of fried grilled cheese, also known as a carrozza, along with a hearty roasted tomato soup.

programme.title: Don't Scream, It's Me
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Liz's ex-boyfriend, Drew, was caught robbing a bank. Now, he's in her backyard, asking her to hide him. She agrees to help, but only once her husband is out of the house.

programme.title: E10 - Grilled Cheese & Tomato Soup Featuring Anna Gass

programme.title: Don't Scream, It's Me
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Liz's ex-boyfriend, Drew, was caught robbing a bank. Now, he's in her backyard, asking her to hide him. She agrees to help, but only once her husband is out of the house.

programme.desc: When her father, Michael Luck, becomes a person of interest in the death of his ex-business partner, Lisa must do whatever she can to help. This means she will need to enlist the aid of her mother, Gabbi.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.desc: In our fast-moving challenging world it is of fundamental importance to sort what's true from what's fake online. programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: E56
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E17 - 談過戀愛卻還是愛情新手
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E3 - 90後父母展現新型帶娃小妙招
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E5 - 「小火車」啟動 快樂老家一起出發
programme.desc: 五位全新的音樂人梁龍、胡夏、白舉綱、希林娜依·高、黃子弘凡以歌手形象反轉擔任Live House工作人員，以全新的姿態再度開啟這趟音樂旅程。同時，帶著全新口號「總有快樂發聲」，一起共同見證更多生活中的美好與驚喜。

programme.title: E17 - 談過戀愛卻還是愛情新手
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E56
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: Showbiz Spy
programme.desc: Cercis Lui goes undercover in this lively comedy as an officer of the 'International Association for the Physical and Mental Health Development of Underage Boys and Girls” dedicated to protecting young boys and girls from being exploited in their pursuit of pop stardom. When tasked with taking down a shady talent show and its mastermind, Big Boss, Cercis must disguise himself as a woman to enter the competition. Only then can he get close enough to gather the evidence to take down the criminal ring. Joining this outlandish operation are Helianthus - an entertainment reporter, Circle O – a wannabe popstar, Lilium - a notorious artist and Oval O – cousin of Circle O from the US. But does this ragtag team have what it takes to triumph over the shady side of the business?

programme.title: All The Long Nights
programme.desc: After a series of mishaps at work caused by her severe pre-menstrual syndrome, Fujisawa lands a new job at an astronomical toy factory, where she meets Yamazoe, a tacit colleague plagued by panic attacks. There the two, whose careers have been derailed by their respective conditions, learn to support and care for each other through life's ups and downs despite their initial friction.

programme.title: The Battle at Lake Changjin II
programme.desc: During the second battle of the War to Resist U.S. Aggression and Aid Korea, the 9th Corps Command issues an order for the 7th Infantry Company to attack the Sumun Bridge. The 7th Company suffers a tough march to the Sumun Bridge. The soldiers are near their limits, every step forward in the midst of the harsh weather only means another great challenge to the body and mind...

programme.title: Manhole
programme.desc: Shunsuke Kawamura worked in a real estate company and was always the best of the best when it came to sales. He was going to marry the daughter of the CEO of his company, but then, something unexpected happened...Just before the day of his wedding, he attended a surprise party held by his colleagues and got drunk. On his way home, he accidentally fell into a deep manhole. By the time he woke up, it was already midnight. What was even worse was that his right leg was heavily injured and he could neither contact the police nor find out his current location using GPS. The only person he could contact was his ex-girlfriend, but she did not believe in his words. He started to believe that he might have been set up by someone, so he decided to set up a new Twitter account named “Manhole Girl”, hoping that with the help of the internet, he could locate himself and call out for help. Netizens excitedly assisted him to search for the suspect.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: Rainy Day Fun
programme.desc: After a day of mud sliding, the kids have to problem solve when heavy rain endangers some of the Kiwifruit Valley creatures.

programme.title: Ice Cream Stick
programme.desc: Ice cream isn't just fun for eating. Hepi and Briko come up with some sizzling ideas.

programme.title: Doki Digs to China
programme.desc: Oto builds a tunnel-boring machine. Doki suggests they find out if what his grandma used to say is true: can we really dig a tunel to China? The boys set off on a journey to bore right into the Earth's crust, while the girls race them to Beijing, China in the plane.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: Old Jeans
programme.desc: Wondering what to do with that old pair of jeans? Hepi and Briko have an excellent idea.

programme.title: Trip to Tahiti
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo have a presentation to prepare for school, and they are scratching their heads to find the most original way to do this. Our friends travel to Tahiti, where they meet with Amana and learn more about telling a story through dance.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: Where is Maths in Time?
programme.desc: Maths has helped us measure time and dates in different ways through the ages, from using the sun to calculate the time to using the lines of longitude to divide the earth into time zones.

programme.title: The Cool Spies
programme.desc: When Oto and Mai spy on Vik to see what he's playing, they discover that sometimes what you thought would be boring can actually be fun!

programme.title: Trip to Sweden
programme.desc: Zoe has just made sweets of different colours, but they are salty! Milo has confused the sugar dispenser with the salt dispenser. Sweets are not supposed to be savoury! But in some places, salty sweets are popular. And, off they go to Sweden.

programme.title: Art of the Steal
programme.desc: Anabella is taking a special art class at an art museum. She manages to produce a near perfect copy of The Starry Night, by Vincent Van Gogh. But soon after the end of the class, a masterpiece goes missing. How can the team prove that Anabella is innocent?

programme.title: Andrea M: Hula Hoop Artist
programme.desc: Alan Pixsley meets hula hooping legend Andrea M, a GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS holder for most spins around the body's backside in a minute. Andrea showcases her talent and shares her journey to mastery. What is the one thing Alan takes away from his encounter with Andrea?

programme.title: The Magician (Steven Frayne) and The Captain (Kate Richardson-Walsh)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, the 'Undisputed King of Magic' Steven Frayne (aka Dynamo) and Olympic gold medallist hockey captain Kate Richardson-Walsh share their insights on success.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 高中畢業出身會計師張浩宇面對大型會計師事務所的不正之風，以最不像會計師的方式實現正義。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E2 - Joseons Defenders
programme.desc: Lasting over five centuries, the Joseon Dynasty was the Korean Penin- sula's longest reigning dynasty, and perhaps its most influential.

programme.title: E2 - Part 2
programme.desc: Though Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow's crime spree is legendary, their story has never been told quite like this. Fueled by their passion for each other and Bonnie's obsession with fame, the couple committed increasingly dangerous robberies, leaving a trail of blood - and headlines - behind them. Aided by Clyde's sixth sense, they stayed one step ahead of the law until their final, fateful showdown.

programme.title: E5 - Prime Time
programme.desc: When the Tanners become a Nielsen family, ALF rigs the people meter to 'skew up' the ratings of his favorite shows--which causes havoc for NBC's President Brandon Tartikoff.

programme.title: E6 - Sting Operation
programme.desc: Billy and Beekeeper Ian extract a bee colony from a family home, then Billy has to dodge talons and beak to remove a Great Horned Owl from a house.

programme.title: E6 - A Pirate Ship´s Last Jaunt
programme.desc: A pirate ship on a voyage. The Kogas - a retired pirate ship, is to start a new life as a noble restaurant in Berlin. But the journey to get there will be difficult, for the Kogas is docked in Lithuania. A risky and extremely difficult heavy transport over a distance of one thousand kilometres lies ahead. Because the Kogas weighs almost fifty tonnes, a special ship will take it across the Baltic Sea to Poland, and from there across the Oder and the Havel Canal to Berlin. The last journey of the Kogas - a huge logistical task where not everything will always go according to plan.

programme.title: E2 - Kitchen Isn't Ready
programme.desc: Seeking inspiration for her menu, Sarah immerses herself in Mumbai’s thriving street food scene. Meanwhile delays on the new restaurant kitchen are putting the team behind schedule.

programme.title: E3 - Bad News
programme.desc: With the gas still not connected in the kitchen, Sarah is unable to train her staff or test the new menu. As the restaurant launch fast approaches there’s more bad news that could put Sarah’s big plans in jeopardy.
